Following Additional Screening:
1. Adverse Media finding: Honeywell Automation India Faces Challenges Amid Broader Market Downturn and Mixed Momentum - Honeywell Automation India has experienced a 3.02% decline amid a broader market downturn, outpacing its sector's decrease of 3.03%. Despite recent declines, the stock's longer-term performance has lagged behind the Sensex, with a 21.31% gain over the last five years, compared to Sensex's 152.13% rise, reflecting ongoing challenges in the electronics components industry.
 Source: https://www.marketsmojo.com/news/stocks-in-action/honeywell-automation-india-stock-declines-3-02-amid-broader-market-downturn-2202009 (Date: 2025-04-26 00:00:00)
2. Adverse Media finding: Honeywell Automation India Faces Continued Stock Decline Amid Broader Market Challenges - Honeywell Automation India's stock has seen a significant decline due to broader market challenges. Despite outperforming its sector, the stock has been trading below key moving averages. The stock experienced a further 3.13% decline on April 7, 2025, marking a 4.42% total drop over two days.
 Source: https://www.marketsmojo.com/news/stocks-in-action/honeywell-automation-india-stock-declines-3-13-trading-above-52-week-low-1736332 (Date: 2025-04-07 00:00:00)
3. Adverse Media finding: Honeywell Automation India Faces Declining Stock Amidst Sector Underperformance and Growth Challenges - Honeywell Automation India is facing a decrease in stock value, experiencing three days of consecutive decline and nearing a 52-week low. Despite its high return on equity, the company has underperformed in the sector and displayed negative long-term growth. However, it still accounts for 29.52% of the industry.
 Source: https://www.marketsmojo.com/news/stocks-in-action/honeywell-automation-india-hits-52-week-low-amid-broader-market-gains-1575230 (Date: 2025-03-24 00:00:00)
4. Adverse Media finding: These 8 high-priced stocks have corrected 25-40% from highs - During a recent market downturn, Honeywell Automation India's stock saw a significant drop of 41% from its 52-week high of Rs 59,700 to Rs 35,112.
 Source: https://m.economictimes.com/markets/stocks/news/these-8-high-priced-stocks-have-corrected-25-40-from-highs/honeywell-automation-india-the-stock-has-fallen-by-41-from-rs-59700-52-week-high-to-rs-35112-/slideshow/118782082.cms (Date: 2025-03-07 00:00:00)
5. Adverse Media finding: Mazagon Dock, Firstsource, BHEL, Honeywell, NHPC, Sobha, OIL: Target prices for 7 stocks - Honeywell Automation India's Q3 results were below Antique Stock Broking's expectations, notably impacted by lower-than-expected revenue booking and disappointment on profitability. Anticipating macroeconomic challenges and global growth risk, Antique trimmed its FY25-27 estimates for Honeywell by 3-19%. Despite these revisions, it maintained a 'Buy' rating for Honeywell, with a revised target price of Rs 44,062.
 Source: https://www.businesstoday.in/markets/stocks/story/mazagon-dock-firstsource-bhel-honeywell-nhpc-sobha-oil-target-prices-for-7-stocks-463997-2025-02-10 (Date: 2025-02-10 00:00:00)
